{{Infobox character
| name = Nila
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]], [[Vallenar Corporation]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|personal attendant, agent}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

''See also: [[Nila Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Nila is a human woman characterized by her short stature, black hair styled in a ponytail, and the use of glasses to assist with reading data from her processor. She operates various consoles, including a wrist-mounted device and ship controls, to manage technical tasks and navigation. While she performs her duties by following orders, she is kept largely in the dark regarding the true identity and motives of her superiors, who instruct her to withhold information from others. During a journey toward [[Dornoth]] via an indirect route, she expresses significant distress and uncertainty regarding the influence of certain mysterious figures who appear to have widespread reach. Her personal motivations include the protection of her son, and she has been observed reacting to violent events with a lack of emotion.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Nila is a human woman with black hair and glasses who serves as the personal attendant to [[Benri Vallenar]]. While working for [[Solstice]], she records meetings and inspects ship autopilots under the guise of her duties. Although she wears a [[Vallenar Corporation]] uniform, she is actually a [[Solstice]] agent who was promised a position within the corporation in exchange for reporting on [[Benri]]. Her motivations include providing for her son, and she eventually provides a recording of a conversation to [[Benri]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nila]] is [[Benri Vallenar]]'s personal attendant.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nila]] is a human woman with black hair and glasses.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nila]] is recording the meeting.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nila]] is inspecting a ship's autopilot.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5">''The Pilot'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nila]] works for [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nila]] was promised a position in the [[Vallenar Corporation]] for reporting on [[Benri]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nila]] has a son.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri]] received a recording of a conversation with [[Nila]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nila]] is a [[Solstice]] agent.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nila]] wears a [[Vallenar Corporation]] uniform.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Solstice]]
[[Category:Vallenar Corporation]]
